feature: MillenniumIT P2c — Dual Auth + Reference Prices + Positions
requirement: Dual authorization, reference price management, positions endpoint

tasks.title: Dual auth + reference prices + positions types/stores/handlers
tasks.description:
Add dual authorization, reference price management, and positions endpoint to securities-service.

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go:
- PendingChange struct: ID, EntityType (INSTRUMENT/MARKET/SEGMENT/CIRCUIT_BREAKER), EntityID, ChangeType (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE), Payload map[string]interface{}, SubmittedBy, Status (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED), ReviewedBy, ReviewComment, SubmittedAt, ReviewedAt — json tags
- ReferencePrice struct: InstrumentID, Price float64, SetBy, SetAt, StaleThresholdMinutes int — json tags

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go:
- PendingChangeStore interface: Create, Get, List(status), Approve(id, reviewerID), Reject(id, reviewerID, comment)
- ReferencePriceStore interface: Get(instrumentID), Set(*ReferencePrice)
- InMemory implementations

Create src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_pending_change.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/pending-changes — submit change (validate: entity_type, change_type, payload required)
- GET /api/v1/securities/pending-changes — list (optional ?status= filter)
- POST /api/v1/securities/pending-changes/{id}/approve — approve (validate: reviewer != submitter)
- POST /api/v1/securities/pending-changes/{id}/reject — reject (validate: comment required)

Create src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_reference_price.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id}/reference-price — get reference price with stale flag
- POST /api/v1/securities/instruments/{id}/reference-price — set reference price (validate: price > 0)
  - Also update circuit breaker store's reference_price if circuit breaker exists for this instrument

Add to existing handlers or new handlers_position.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/positions — list all positions from positionStore

Update server.go + main.go with new stores and routes.
Update gateway routes.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for dual auth, reference prices, positions
tasks.description:
Write tests for P2c features.

Tests:

1. store_test.go:
- TestPendingChangeStore_Create_Get
- TestPendingChangeStore_ListByStatus — create pending+approved, filter
- TestPendingChangeStore_Approve — approve pending → APPROVED, reviewer set
- TestPendingChangeStore_Reject — reject with comment
- TestReferencePriceStore_SetGet — set and retrieve
- TestReferencePriceStore_Stale — set price, check stale flag

2. New: handlers_pending_change_test.go:
- TestSubmitPendingChange_Success → 201
- TestSubmitPendingChange_MissingFields → 400
- TestApprovePendingChange_Success → 200
- TestApprovePendingChange_SameUser → 403 (reviewer != submitter)
- TestRejectPendingChange → 200
- TestListPendingChanges_FilterByStatus

3. New: handlers_reference_price_test.go:
- TestSetReferencePrice_Success → 200, updates circuit breaker store too
- TestSetReferencePrice_InvalidPrice → 400
- TestGetReferencePrice → 200 with stale flag

4. handlers_position_test.go (or add to existing):
- TestListPositions_Empty → 200 with empty array
- TestListPositions_WithData → positions returned

Target: 70%+.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
